llmResponse.agenda_changes: President Díaz-Slocum announced two groups of modifications: (1) Move all second reading and approvals EXCEPT the bylaw (items 13.6-13.10) to consent; (2) Move the Measure U addendums (items 13.4-13.10) to consent. Board unanimously approved these changes.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Moving to the Consent items, which includes action items 13.4 to 13.10. Can I have a motion to move them? Second, all in favor? Hi.

items.intro_words: Good evening, everyone. We're going to reconvene the meeting.
Evelyn, can I have roll call, please? Trustee mcevoy?
No oral communication. None. In person as well.
Moving right along to item nine, school community reports citizens measure
Moving on to item 10, bond program consent items.
Item 11, bond program action items. Let's see. We have one.
Moving to the Consent items, which includes action items 13.4 to 13.10.
Which brings us to 14.1 Report from board members and Superintendent Cecilia.
16.1 possible other business suggested items for future agendas. None.
And seven. I'm sorry, I don't have one. It's going to be an off site
So are there any changes to the board meeting calendar besides the ones you mentioned?
Well thank you everybody. And can I have a motion to adjourn?
